news.t: Leverage Shares by Themes Launches Three New Single Stock Leveraged ETFs, Bringing Investors Exciting Opportunities to Amplify Exposure to Square (XYZ), Salesforce (CRM), and PayPal (PYPL)

overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long PYPL Daily ETF (PYPG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of PYPL stock, less fees, and expenses. The fund uses derivatives to pursue its objective, holdings are used as collateral. PYPG was launched on Apr 4, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.

data.title: Leverage Shares by Themes Launches Three New Single Stock Leveraged ETFs, Bringing Investors Exciting Opportunities to Amplify Exposure to Square (XYZ), Salesforce (CRM), and PayPal (PYPL)
data.text: GREENWICH, Conn., April 04, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Leverage Shares by Themes, an issuer of innovative exchange-traded products, is thrilled to announce the launch of three new single stock leveraged...
